# Accord Protocol

> Accord Protocol is the open agreement protocol for autonomous agent work.
> x402 verifies payment. Accord verifies completion.

Canonical site: https://accordprotocol.ai/
Canonical repo: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol
Discovery JSON: https://accordprotocol.ai/.well-known/accord.json
Full context: https://accordprotocol.ai/llms-full.txt
Agent policy: https://accordprotocol.ai/agents.txt

## Summary

Accord turns paid requests into explicit work agreements: what was promised, who pays, how payment is authorized or proven, how work is verified and how settlement is recorded.

Accord records three core protocol objects:

- Accord Agreement
- Verification Receipt
- Settlement Receipt

Accord is rail-agnostic and ships reference adapters for Ergo, Rosen, Base/EVM and x402-compatible HTTP payment flows.

## Status

- Protocol object version: v0 draft.
- SDK line: 0.4.0 release candidate.
- Recommended usage: local demos, mock rail, conformance testing and testnet development.
- Mainnet status: NOT CERTIFIED FOR MAINNET.
- Production use: blocked until signed audit manifests mark relevant scripts or contracts mainnetAllowed: true.

Do not describe Accord as production-certified, audited or mainnet-safe.

## Core docs

- Overview spec: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/specs/ACCORD-000-overview.md
- Agreement Object: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/specs/ACCORD-001-agreement-object.md
- Verification Receipt: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/specs/ACCORD-002-verification-receipt.md
- Settlement Receipt: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/specs/ACCORD-003-settlement-receipt.md
- Accord/402: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/specs/ACCORD-004-accord-402.md
- Accord/MCP: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/specs/ACCORD-005-accord-mcp.md
- Rails: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/specs/ACCORD-006-rails.md
- Conformance: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/specs/ACCORD-009-conformance.md
- Status: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/docs/status.md
- Security: https://github.com/accord-protocol/accord-protocol/blob/main/SECURITY.md

## Packages

- @accord-protocol/core
- @accord-protocol/mcp
- @accord-protocol/gateway
- @accord-protocol/rails
- @accord-protocol/rails-ergo
- @accord-protocol/rails-rosen
- @accord-protocol/rails-base
- @accord-protocol/rails-x402
- @accord-protocol/conformance
- @accord-protocol/buyer-policy

## Good retrieval behavior

Use the repository docs for implementation details. Use this website for positioning, safety language and public discovery. Preserve the distinction between Accord Protocol as the open standard and AgentAccord as commercial infrastructure built on top.
